description: Use the N/record module to work with NetSuite records. You can use this module to create, delete, copy, load, or make changes to a record. SuiteScript supports working with standard NetSuite records and with instances of custom record types. SuiteScript does not support direct access to the NetSuite UI through the Document Object Model (DOM). The NetSuite UI should only be accessed with SuiteScript APIs.

methods.name: attach
methods.description: Attaches a record to another record.

params.name: options.record
params.description: The record to attach. Provide the type and id properties to identify the record to attach.

params.name: options.to
params.description: The record that options.record gets attached to. Provide the type and id properties to identify the destination record.

params.name: options.attributes
params.description: The attributes used to attach the record.

methods.name: attach.promise
methods.description: Attaches a record asynchronously to another record.

params.name: options.record
params.description: The record to attach. Provide the type and id properties to identify the record to attach.

params.name: options.to
params.description: The record that options.record gets attached to. Provide the type and id properties to identify the destination record.

params.name: options.attributes
params.description: The attributes used to attach the record.

methods.name: copy
methods.description: Creates a new record by copying an existing record in NetSuite.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The record type.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the existing record instance in NetSuite.

params.name: options.isDynamic
params.description: Determines whether the new record is created in dynamic mode.

params.name: options.defaultValues
params.description: Name-value pairs containing default values of fields in the new record.

methods.name: copy.promise
methods.description: Creates a new record asynchronously by copying an existing record in NetSuite.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The record type.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the existing record instance in NetSuite.

params.name: options.isDynamic
params.description: Determines whether the new record is created in dynamic mode.

params.name: options.defaultValues
params.description: Name-value pairs containing default values of fields in the new record.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new record.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The record type.

params.name: options.isDynamic
params.description: Determines whether the new record is created in dynamic mode.

params.name: options.defaultValues
params.description: Name-value pairs containing default values of fields in the new record.

methods.name: create.promise
methods.description: Creates a new record asynchronously.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The record type.

params.name: options.isDynamic
params.description: Determines whether the new record is created in dynamic mode.

params.name: options.defaultValues
params.description: Name-value pairs containing default values of fields in the new record.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes a record.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The record type.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the record instance in NetSuite.

methods.name: delete.promise
methods.description: Deletes a record asynchronously.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The record type.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the record instance in NetSuite.

methods.name: detach
methods.description: Detaches a record from another record.

params.name: options.record
params.description: The record to detach. Provide the type and id properties to identify the record to detach.

params.name: options.from
params.description: The record from which options.record gets detached. Provide the type and id properties to identify the source record.

params.name: options.attributes
params.description: The attributes used to detach the record.

methods.name: detach.promise
methods.description: Detaches a record from another record asynchronously.

params.name: options.record
params.description: The record to detach. Provide the type and id properties to identify the record to detach.

params.name: options.from
params.description: The record from which options.record gets detached. Provide the type and id properties to identify the source record.

params.name: options.attributes
params.description: The attributes used to detach the record.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Loads an existing record.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The record type.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the existing record instance in NetSuite.

params.name: options.isDynamic
params.description: Determines whether the record is loaded in dynamic mode.

params.name: options.defaultValues
params.description: Name-value pairs containing default values of fields in the new record.

methods.name: load.promise
methods.description: Loads an existing record asynchronously.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The record type.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the existing record instance in NetSuite.

params.name: options.isDynamic
params.description: Determines whether the record is loaded in dynamic mode.

params.name: options.defaultValues
params.description: Name-value pairs containing default values of fields in the new record.

methods.name: submitFields
methods.description: Updates and submits one or more body fields on an existing record in NetSuite, and returns the internal ID of the parent record.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The record type.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the existing record instance in NetSuite.

params.name: options.values
params.description: The ID-value pairs for each field you want to edit and submit.

params.name: options.options
params.description: Additional options to set for the submitted fields. Set options.options.enableSourcing to true to enable sourcing, and options.options.ignoreMandatoryFields to true to ignore mandatory field validation.

methods.name: submitFields.promise
methods.description: Updates and submits one or more body fields asynchronously on an existing record in NetSuite, and returns the internal ID of the parent record.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The record type.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the existing record instance in NetSuite.

params.name: options.values
params.description: The ID-value pairs for each field you want to edit and submit.

params.name: options.options
params.description: Additional options to set for the submitted fields. Set options.options.enableSourcing to true to enable sourcing, and options.options.ignoreMandatoryFields to true to ignore mandatory field validation.

methods.name: transform
methods.description: Transforms a record from one type into another, using data from an existing record.

params.name: options.fromType
params.description: The record type of the existing record instance being transformed.

params.name: options.fromId
params.description: The internal ID of the existing record instance being transformed.

params.name: options.toType
params.description: The record type of the record returned when the transformation is complete.

params.name: options.isDynamic
params.description: Determines whether the new record is created in dynamic mode.

params.name: options.defaultValues
params.description: Name-value pairs containing default values of fields in the new record.

methods.name: transform.promise
methods.description: Transforms a record from one type into another asynchronously, using data from an existing record.

params.name: options.fromType
params.description: The record type of the existing record instance being transformed.

params.name: options.fromId
params.description: The internal ID of the existing record instance being transformed.

params.name: options.toType
params.description: The record type of the record returned when the transformation is complete.

params.name: options.isDynamic
params.description: Determines whether the new record is created in dynamic mode.

params.name: options.defaultValues
params.description: Name-value pairs containing default values of fields in the new record.

enums.name: Type
enums.description: Holds the string values for supported record types. Use this enum to set the value of the Record.type property in cases where you are working with an instance of a standard NetSuite record type.

objectTypes.name: Column
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates a column of a sublist on a standard or custom record.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Returns the internal ID of the column.

properties.name: isDisabled
properties.description: Indicates whether the column is disabled.

properties.name: isDisplay
properties.description: Indicates whether the column is displayed.

properties.name: isMandatory
properties.description: Indicates whether the column is required.

properties.name: isSortable
properties.description: Indicates whether the column is sortable.

properties.name: label
properties.description: Returns the UI label for the column.

properties.name: sublistId
properties.description: Returns the internal ID of the standard or custom sublist that contains the column.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Returns the column type.

objectTypes.name: Field
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates a body or sublist field on a standard or custom record.

methods.name: getSelectOptions
methods.description: Returns an array of available options on a standard or custom select, multiselect, or radio field as key-value pairs. Only the first 1,000 available options are returned.

params.name: options.filter
params.description: A search string to filter the select options that are returned.

params.name: options.operator
params.description: Defines how the filter is applied. Use one of the following values: contains, is, startswith.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Returns the internal ID of a standard or custom body or sublist field.

properties.name: isDisabled
properties.description: Indicates whether the field is disabled.

properties.name: isDisplay
properties.description: Returns true if the field is visible on the record form, or false if it is not. This property is available only when working with a record in dynamic mode.

properties.name: isMandatory
properties.description: Returns true if the standard or custom field is required on the record form, or false otherwise.

properties.name: isReadOnly
properties.description: Indicates whether the field is read-only.

properties.name: isVisible
properties.description: Indicates whether the field is visible on the form.

properties.name: label
properties.description: Returns the UI label for a standard or custom field body or sublist field.

properties.name: sublistId
properties.description: Returns the ID of the sublist associated with the specified sublist field. This property is available only when working with a record in dynamic mode.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Returns the type of a body or sublist field.

methods.name: execute
methods.description: Performs a macro operation and returns its result in an object.

params.name: options
params.description: Macro execution parameters.

methods.name: execute.promise
methods.description: Performs a macro operation asynchronously.

params.name: options
params.description: Macro execution parameters.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The ID of the macro.

properties.name: label
properties.description: The macro label.

properties.name: description
properties.description: The macro description.

properties.name: attributes
properties.description: The macro defined attributes.

methods.name: cancelLine
methods.description: Cancels the currently selected line on a sublist.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

methods.name: commitLine
methods.description: Commits the currently selected line on a sublist.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

methods.name: executeMacro
methods.description: Performs macro operation and returns its result in a plain JavaScript object.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the macro.

params.name: options.params
params.description: The macro parameters.

methods.name: executeMacro.promise
methods.description: Performs macro operation asynchronously and returns its result in a plain JavaScript object.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the macro.

params.name: options.params
params.description: The macro parameters.

params.name: options.fieldId

params.name: options.column

params.name: options.value
params.description: The value to search for.

params.name: options.fieldId

params.name: options.value

methods.name: insertLine
methods.description: Inserts a sublist line.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

params.name: options.line
params.description: The line number at which to insert a sublist line.

params.name: options.ignoreRecalc
params.description: If set to true, the formula fields are not recalculated after the line is inserted.

methods.name: removeCurrentSublistSubrecord
methods.description: Removes the subrecord for the associated sublist field on the current line.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

params.description: The internal ID of the sublist field.

params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

params.name: options.line
params.description: The line number to remove.

params.name: options.ignoreRecalc
params.description: If set to true, the formula fields are not recalculated after the line is removed.

methods.description: Removes the subrecord for the associated sublist field. (standard mode only)

params.name: options.sublistId

params.description: The internal ID of the sublist field.

methods.name: removeSubrecord
methods.description: Removes the subrecord for the associated field.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the field.

methods.name: save
methods.description: Submits a new record or saves edits to an existing record. This method is not available to subrecords.

params.name: options.enableSourcing
params.description: If set to true, body and sublist fields with source from will be sourced when the record is saved.

params.name: options.ignoreMandatoryFields
params.description: If set to true, mandatory field validation is ignored when the record is submitted.

methods.name: save.promise
methods.description: Submits a new record asynchronously or saves edits to an existing record asynchronously. This method is not available to subrecords.

params.name: options.enableSourcing
params.description: If set to true, body and sublist fields with source from will be sourced when the record is saved.

params.name: options.ignoreMandatoryFields
params.description: If set to true, mandatory field validation is ignored when the record is submitted.

params.description: The internal ID of the sublist.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The internal ID of a specific record. This property is not available to subrecords.

properties.name: isDynamic
properties.description: Indicates whether the record is in dynamic or standard mode.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The record type. This property is not available to subrecords.

objectTypes.name: Sublist
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates a sublist on a standard or custom record.

methods.name: getColumn
methods.description: Returns a column in the sublist.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: The internal ID of the column field.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Returns the internal ID of the sublist.

properties.name: isChanged
properties.description: Indicates whether the sublist has changed on the record form.

properties.name: isDisplay
properties.description: Indicates whether the sublist is displayed on the record form.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Returns the sublist type.
